description: Celebrate your furry friends with exclusive discounts and special offers this National Pet Day. Our email template, designed for e-commerce in the Pets and Animal Care industry, caters to all pet lovers, especially those smitten with dogs. It's not just a sale, it's a bonanza of irresistible deals on a wide range of pet essentials from food to toys, all with the added benefit of free shipping. Plus, enjoy a special treat for your pooch on every purchase. The template's dark mode design offers a sleek and modern aesthetic that will enhance your promotional content, making this the perfect way to make your customers' shopping experience as enjoyable as a day spent with their pets.
short_description: Celebrate National Pet Day with exclusive discounts on pet essentials. Enjoy special offers, a wide range of sale items, and free shipping for your furry friends. Our dark mode e-commerce template is perfect for pet care promotions, with a special treat for dog lovers.

designer.description: I am a web and graphic designer deeply fascinated by UI/UX. Constantly upgrading my skills, I strive to create visually stunning and user-friendly designs and digital experiences that leave a lasting impact.

html_data:
Did I just hear someone say

TREATS + SALE?
GET 25% OFF
 

A REAL TREAT

Check out below a few of the pawmazing products you can get with a special price:

$23.99  $18.00

$23.99  $18.00

$23.99  $18.00

$23.99  $18.00

FREE SHIPPING ON ORDERS $50+

 

But don't forget one important detail about this offer:

ONLY AVAILABLE UNTIL 

 MAY 3RD

 
SHOP NOW
 

Oh, and another very important detail....

 

10% OF THE PROFIT GOES FOR THE CITY'S DOG SHELTER

For every sale made during this campaign, we are dedicating 10% of the profit to the local Dog Shelter. This way, the purchase of our products will make more than just your dog happy 🐾 !

SHOP NOW
 
 
 

CHECK OUT OUR BLOG
